book: THE GOSPEL ACCORDING TO ST. MATTHEW

verses.text: And seeing the multitudes, he went up into a mountain: and when he was set, his disciples came unto him:
And he opened his mouth, and taught them, saying,
\+w Blessed\+w* \+add are\+add* \+w the poor\+w* \+w in spirit\+w*: \+w for\+w* \+w theirs\+w* \+w is\+w* \+w the kingdom\+w* \+w of heaven\+w*.
\+w Blessed\+w* \+add are\+add* \+w they that mourn\+w*: \+w for\+w* \+w they\+w* \+w shall be comforted\+w*.
\+w Blessed\+w* \+add are\+add* \+w the meek\+w*: \+w for\+w* \+w they\+w* \+w shall inherit\+w* \+w the earth\+w*.
\+w Blessed\+w* \+add are\+add* \+w they which do hunger\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w thirst\+w* \+w after righteousness\+w*: \+w for\+w* \+w they\+w* \+w shall be filled\+w*.
\+w Blessed\+w* \+add are\+add* \+w the merciful\+w*: \+w for\+w* \+w they\+w* \+w shall obtain mercy\+w*.
\+w Blessed\+w* \+add are\+add* \+w the pure\+w* \+w in heart\+w*: \+w for\+w* \+w they\+w* \+w shall see\+w* \+w God\+w*.
\+w Blessed\+w* \+add are\+add* \+w the peacemakers\+w*: \+w for\+w* \+w they\+w* \+w shall be called\+w* \+w the children\+w* \+w of God\+w*.
\+w Blessed\+w* \+add are\+add* \+w they which are persecuted\+w* \+w for\+w* \+w righteousness’\+w* \+w sake\+w*: \+w for\+w* \+w theirs\+w* \+w is\+w* \+w the kingdom\+w* \+w of heaven\+w*.

\+w Blessed\+w* \+w are ye\+w*, \+w when\+w* \+add men\+add* \+w shall revile\+w* \+w you\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w persecute\+w* \+add you\+add*, \+w and\+w* \+w shall say\+w* \+w all manner of\+w* \+w evil\+w* \+w against\+w* \+w you\+w* \+w falsely\+w*, \+w for\+w* \+w my\+w* \+w sake\+w*.

\+w Rejoice\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w be exceeding glad\+w*: \+w for\+w* \+w great\+w* \+add is\+add* \+w your\+w* \+w reward\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w heaven\+w*: \+w for\+w* \+w so\+w* \+w persecuted they\+w* \+w the prophets\+w* \+w which were\+w* \+w before\+w* \+w you\+w*.

¶ \+w Ye\+w* \+w are\+w* \+w the salt\+w* \+w of the earth\+w*: \+w but\+w* \+w if\+w* \+w the salt\+w* \+w have lost his savour\+w*, \+w wherewith\+w* \+w shall it be salted\+w*? \+w it is\+w* \+w thenceforth\+w* \+w good\+w* \+w for\+w* \+w nothing\+w*, \+w but\+w* \+w to be cast\+w* \+w out\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w to be trodden under foot\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w men\+w*.
\+w Ye\+w* \+w are\+w* \+w the light\+w* \+w of the world\+w*. \+w A city\+w* \+w that is set\+w* \+w on\+w* \+w an hill\+w* \+w cannot\+w* \+w be hid\+w*.

\+w Neither\+w* do men \+w light\+w* \+w a candle\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w put\+w* \+w it\+w* \+w under\+w* \+w a bushel\+w*, \+w but\+w* \+w on\+w* \+w a candlestick\+w*; \+w and\+w* \+w it giveth light\+w* \+w unto all\+w* \+w that are\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w the house\+w*.

Let \+w your\+w* \+w light\+w* \+w so\+w* \+w shine\+w* \+w before\+w* \+w men\+w*, \+w that\+w* \+w they may see\+w* \+w your\+w* \+w good\+w* \+w works\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w glorify\+w* \+w your\+w* \+w Father\+w* \+w which is\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w heaven\+w*.

¶ \+w Think\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w I am come\+w* \+w to destroy\+w* \+w the law\+w*, \+w or\+w* \+w the prophets\+w*: \+w I am\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w come\+w* \+w to destroy\+w*, \+w but\+w* \+w to fulfil\+w*.

\+w For\+w* \+w verily\+w* \+w I say\+w* \+w unto you\+w*, \+w Till\+w* \+w heaven\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w earth\+w* \+w pass\+w*, \+w one\+w* \+w jot\+w* \+w or\+w* \+w one\+w* \+w tittle\+w* \+w shall\+w* \+w in no\+w* \+w wise\+w* \+w pass\+w* \+w from\+w* \+w the law\+w*, \+w till\+w* \+w all\+w* \+w be fulfilled\+w*.

\+w Whosoever\+w* \+w therefore\+w* \+w shall break\+w* \+w one\+w* \+w of these\+w* \+w least\+w* \+w commandments\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w shall teach\+w* \+w men\+w* \+w so\+w*, he \+w shall be called\+w* \+w the least\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w the kingdom\+w* \+w of heaven\+w*: \+w but\+w* \+w whosoever\+w* \+w shall do\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w teach\+w* \+add them\+add*, \+w the same\+w* \+w shall be called\+w* \+w great\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w the kingdom\+w* \+w of heaven\+w*.

\+w For\+w* \+w I say\+w* \+w unto you\+w*, \+w That\+w* \+w except\+w* \+w your\+w* \+w righteousness\+w* \+w shall exceed\+w* \+add the righteousness\+add* \+w of the scribes\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w Pharisees\+w*, \+w ye shall\+w* \+w in no\+w* \+w case\+w* \+w enter\+w* \+w into\+w* \+w the kingdom\+w* \+w of heaven\+w*.

¶ \+w Ye have heard\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w it was said\+w* \+w by them of old time\+w*, \+w Thou shalt\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w kill\+w*; \+w and\+w* \+w whosoever\+w* \+w shall kill\+w* \+w shall be\+w* \+w in danger\+w* \+w of the judgment\+w*:

\+w But\+w* \+w I\+w* \+w say\+w* \+w unto you\+w*, \+w That\+w* \+w whosoever\+w* \+w is angry\+w* \+w with\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w brother\+w* \+w without a cause\+w* \+w shall be\+w* \+w in danger\+w* \+w of the judgment\+w*: \+w and\+w* \+w whosoever\+w* \+w shall say\+w* \+w to\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w brother\+w*, \+w Raca\+w*, \+w shall be\+w* \+w in danger\+w* \+w of the council\+w*: \+w but\+w* \+w whosoever\+w* \+w shall say\+w*, \+w Thou fool\+w*, \+w shall be\+w* \+w in danger\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w hell\+w* \+w fire\+w*.

\+w Therefore\+w* \+w if\+w* \+w thou bring\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w gift\+w* \+w to\+w* \+w the altar\+w*, \+w and there\+w* \+w rememberest\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w brother\+w* \+w hath\+w* \+w ought\+w* \+w against\+w* \+w thee\+w*;

\+w Leave\+w* \+w there\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w gift\+w* \+w before\+w* \+w the altar\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w go thy way\+w*; \+w first\+w* \+w be reconciled\+w* \+w to\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w brother\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w then\+w* \+w come\+w* \+w and offer\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w gift\+w*.

\+w Agree with\+w* \+w thine\+w* \+w adversary\+w* \+w quickly\+w*, \+w whiles\+w* \+w thou art\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w the way\+w* \+w with\+w* \+w him\+w*; \+w lest at any time\+w* \+w the adversary\+w* \+w deliver\+w* \+w thee\+w* \+w to the judge\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w the judge\+w* \+w deliver\+w* \+w thee\+w* \+w to the officer\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w thou be cast\+w* \+w into\+w* \+w prison\+w*.
\+w Verily\+w* \+w I say\+w* \+w unto thee\+w*, Thou shalt \+w by no\+w* \+w means\+w* \+w come out\+w* \+w thence\+w*, \+w till\+w* \+w thou hast paid\+w* \+w the uttermost\+w* \+w farthing\+w*.
¶ \+w Ye have heard\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w it was said\+w* \+w by them of old time\+w*, \+w Thou shalt\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w commit adultery\+w*:

\+w But\+w* \+w I\+w* \+w say\+w* \+w unto you\+w*, \+w That\+w* \+w whosoever\+w* \+w looketh\+w* \+w on a woman\+w* \+w to\+w* \+w lust after\+w* \+w her\+w* \+w hath committed adultery\+w* \+w with her\+w* \+w already\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w heart\+w*.

\+w And\+w* \+w if\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w right\+w* \+w eye\+w* \+w offend\+w* \+w thee\+w*, \+w pluck\+w* \+w it\+w* \+w out\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w cast\+w* \+add it\+add* \+w from\+w* \+w thee\+w*: \+w for\+w* \+w it is profitable\+w* \+w for thee\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w one\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w members\+w* \+w should perish\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w not\+w* \+add that\+add* \+w thy\+w* \+w whole\+w* \+w body\+w* \+w should be cast\+w* \+w into\+w* \+w hell\+w*.

\+w And\+w* \+w if\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w right\+w* \+w hand\+w* \+w offend\+w* \+w thee\+w*, \+w cut\+w* \+w it\+w* \+w off\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w cast\+w* \+add it\+add* \+w from\+w* \+w thee\+w*: \+w for\+w* \+w it is profitable\+w* \+w for thee\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w one\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w members\+w* \+w should perish\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w not\+w* \+add that\+add* \+w thy\+w* \+w whole\+w* \+w body\+w* \+w should be cast\+w* \+w into\+w* \+w hell\+w*.
\+w It hath been said\+w*, \+w Whosoever\+w* \+w shall put away\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w wife\+w*, \+w let him give\+w* \+w her\+w* \+w a writing of divorcement\+w*:

\+w But\+w* \+w I\+w* \+w say\+w* \+w unto you\+w*, \+w That\+w* \+w whosoever\+w* \+w shall put away\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w wife\+w*, \+w saving\+w* \+w for the cause\+w* \+w of fornication\+w*, \+w causeth\+w* \+w her\+w* \+w to commit adultery\+w*: \+w and\+w* \+w whosoever\+w* \+w shall marry\+w* \+w her that is divorced\+w* \+w committeth adultery\+w*.

¶ \+w Again\+w*, \+w ye have heard\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w it hath been said\+w* \+w by them of old time\+w*, \+w Thou shalt\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w forswear thyself\+w*, \+w but\+w* \+w shalt perform\+w* \+w unto the Lord\+w* \+w thine\+w* \+w oaths\+w*:
\+w But\+w* \+w I\+w* \+w say\+w* \+w unto you\+w*, \+w Swear\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w at all\+w*; \+w neither\+w* \+w by\+w* \+w heaven\+w*; \+w for\+w* \+w it is\+w* \+w God’s\+w* \+w throne\+w*:

\+w Nor\+w* \+w by\+w* \+w the earth\+w*; \+w for\+w* \+w it is\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w footstool\+w*: \+w neither\+w* \+w by\+w* \+w Jerusalem\+w*; \+w for\+w* \+w it is\+w* \+w the city\+w* \+w of the\+w* \+w great\+w* \+w King\+w*.

\+w Neither\+w* \+w shalt thou swear\+w* \+w by\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w head\+w*, \+w because\+w* \+w thou canst\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w make\+w* \+w one\+w* \+w hair\+w* \+w white\+w* \+w or\+w* \+w black\+w*.

\+w But\+w* \+w let\+w* \+w your\+w* \+w communication\+w* \+w be\+w*, \+w Yea\+w*, \+w yea\+w*; \+w Nay\+w*, \+w nay\+w*: \+w for\+w* \+w whatsoever is more than\+w* \+w these\+w* \+w cometh\+w* \+w of\+w* \+w evil\+w*.
¶ \+w Ye have heard\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w it hath been said\+w*, \+w An eye\+w* \+w for\+w* \+w an eye\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w a tooth\+w* \+w for\+w* \+w a tooth\+w*:

\+w But\+w* \+w I\+w* \+w say\+w* \+w unto you\+w*, \+w That ye resist\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w evil\+w*: \+w but\+w* \+w whosoever\+w* \+w shall smite\+w* \+w thee\+w* \+w on\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w right\+w* \+w cheek\+w*, \+w turn\+w* \+w to him\+w* \+w the other\+w* \+w also\+w*.

\+w And if\+w* \+w any man will\+w* \+w sue\+w* \+w thee\+w* \+w at the law\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w take away\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w coat\+w*, \+w let\+w* \+w him\+w* \+w have\+w* \+add thy\+add* \+w cloke\+w* \+w also\+w*.
\+w And\+w* \+w whosoever\+w* \+w shall compel\+w* \+w thee\+w* \+w to go\+w* \+w a\+w* \+w mile\+w*, \+w go\+w* \+w with\+w* \+w him\+w* \+w twain\+w*.
\+w Give\+w* \+w to him that asketh\+w* \+w thee\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w from\+w* \+w him that would\+w* \+w borrow\+w* \+w of thee\+w* \+w turn\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w thou away\+w*.
¶ \+w Ye have heard\+w* \+w that\+w* \+w it hath been said\+w*, \+w Thou shalt love\+w* \+w thy\+w* \+w neighbour\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w hate\+w* \+w thine\+w* \+w enemy\+w*.

\+w But\+w* \+w I\+w* \+w say\+w* \+w unto you\+w*, \+w Love\+w* \+w your\+w* \+w enemies\+w*, \+w bless\+w* \+w them that curse\+w* \+w you\+w*, \+w do\+w* \+w good\+w* \+w to them that hate\+w* \+w you\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w pray\+w* \+w for\+w* \+w them which despitefully use\+w* \+w you\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w persecute\+w* \+w you\+w*;

\+w That\+w* \+w ye may be\+w* \+w the children\+w* \+w of your\+w* \+w Father\+w* \+w which is\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w heaven\+w*: \+w for\+w* \+w he maketh\+w* \+w his\+w* \+w sun\+w* \+w to rise\+w* \+w on\+w* \+w the evil\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w on the good\+w*, \+w and\+w* \+w sendeth rain\+w* \+w on\+w* \+w the just\+w* \+w and\+w* \+w on the unjust\+w*.
\+w For\+w* \+w if\+w* \+w ye love\+w* \+w them which love\+w* \+w you\+w*, \+w what\+w* \+w reward\+w* \+w have ye\+w*? \+w do\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w even\+w* \+w the publicans\+w* \+w the same\+w*?

\+w And\+w* \+w if\+w* \+w ye salute\+w* \+w your\+w* \+w brethren\+w* \+w only\+w*, \+w what\+w* \+w do\+w* ye \+w more\+w* \+add than others\+add*? \+w do\+w* \+w not\+w* \+w even\+w* \+w the publicans\+w* \+w so\+w*?
\+w Be\+w* \+w ye\+w* \+w therefore\+w* \+w perfect\+w*, \+w even as\+w* \+w your\+w* \+w Father\+w* \+w which is\+w* \+w in\+w* \+w heaven\+w* \+w is\+w* \+w perfect\+w*.
